name: sem04_theoretical_conflict_authority
description: Hard cases for theoretical conflict cleanup where provider-local lexicon can assist retrieval but may not act as final authority.

papers.title: Cusp explanation of Zc(3900)
papers.abstract: A threshold cusp can mimic the observed enhancement.

papers.title: Triangle-singularity origin of Zc(3900)
papers.abstract: The peak follows from a triangle singularity rather than a genuine resonance.

papers.title: X(3872) as a molecular state
papers.abstract: We interpret X(3872) as a hadronic molecule near threshold.

papers.title: Compact tetraquark interpretation of X(3872)
papers.abstract: We argue X(3872) is a compact tetraquark state.

client_response.reasoning: The claims emphasize different observables and therefore are not directly comparable.
